name: Chamonix lodging (Jul 28-30)
notes: Independent visitor lodging — 2 nights covering Concert #1 (Martigny, Jul 29).

options.title: Attractive apartment in the center of Chamonix
options.location: Chamonix center, France (near ski lifts)
options.notes: Triplex, 40-45 m². ★4.85 (75 reviews). Hosted by Antoine (Superhost, 8 yrs). Walking distance to shops and SUD bus station. Heads-up from a guest review: spiral staircase to bedrooms, no smoke/CO detectors. UNAVAILABLE for Jul 28-30, 2026 (booking widget shows 'Those dates are not available' as of 2026-05-10).

options.title: Sunny Balcony / Mont-Blanc View / City center
options.location: Chamonix Sud, Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France (facing Mont Blanc and Les Bossons glacier; steps from Aiguille du Midi gondola)
amenities: Steps from Aiguille du Midi gondola
options.notes: 600 sq ft 1BR. ★4.91 (299 reviews). Hosted by Alexandra (Superhost, 10 yrs). Sleeps 5 max: king + queen sofa bed + bunk beds. Caveat: limited hot water — water heater can't accommodate >4 showers in succession. Availability confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 (total $1,042) on 2026-05-10.

options.title: Chamonix 136 — Alpine retreat between Les Houches and Chamonix
options.location: 67 Chem. des Granges, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc — between Les Houches and Chamonix; near Taconnaz station for free Mont Blanc Express rail
options.notes: 2BR/1BA between Les Houches and Chamonix. Bedrooms: double on mezzanine + bunk room with pullout single. Fireplace, ski locker, free Mont Blanc Express access from nearby station. Geneva Airport ~1h15. Price includes taxes & fees. Availability confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 ($672.80, Book Now active) on 2026-05-10.

options.title: Argentiere 7 — 4BR chalet, sleeps 10
options.location: Argentière, Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France — up-valley village (~10 min drive / train to Chamonix center, ~1h 10m to Geneva Airport)
options.notes: 4BR/2BA chalet in Argentière village, registration 74056000826RC. Beds: 2 doubles + 4 twins + 1 bunk (twin/twin). Capacity 10 is well over the family of 4 — could fit extended family/visitors if needed. ⚠️ NO ONLINE BOOKING — site shows 'Make Enquiry' button, requires calling 1-407-495-2595 or live chat for an actual quote. Base rate 'from $173/nt' shown but no firm total for Jul 28-30. Site indicated the dates 'cannot be booked' online — could mean unavailable, or just that this property always requires inquiry; needs phone confirmation. Argentière → Hotel Lykke ~10 min; Argentière → GVA ~1h 10m.

options.title: Argentiere 26 (Appt Bec D1)
options.location: 5 Rte du Tour, Argentière, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc — Les Frasserands village (~10 km from Chamonix center)
amenities: Close to ski lifts (3 min to La Vormaine)
options.notes: 3BR/2BA condo. Beds: 2 doubles + twin + trundle. Located in Argentière village, not central Chamonix — bus shuttle to slopes. ⚠️ NO WIFI per the listing. Price includes taxes & fees. Availability confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 ($789.43, Book Now active) on 2026-05-10.

options.title: Ground-Floor Chalet Apt — 3 En-Suites + Garden (Les Houches)
options.location: Les Houches, Chamonix valley, France — ~6 min by train (Mont Blanc Express) to Chamonix center
options.notes: Cheapest 3BR option that meets the bed criteria. Bedrooms: BR1 1 double + BR2 1 double + 1 bunk + BR3 1 double — 3 doubles + bunk, sleeps up to 8 (perfect for 4 adults + 2 kids). ★4.89 (247 reviews), Guest Favorite. Hosted by Howard, Agnes And Eva (Superhost). Located in Les Houches, ~6 min by train to Chamonix center via Mont Blanc Express. Free cancellation before July 14, 2026. Availability + total confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 on 2026-05-11.

options.title: Beautiful 3 bedrooms with Mont Blanc view (Argentière)
options.location: Argentière (~9 km NE of Chamonix center, near Grands Montets lifts) — Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France
options.notes: Strong fit. Bedrooms: BR1 1 queen + BR2 1 queen + BR3 2 single beds + 1 bunk — 2 queens for adults, BR3 sleeps up to 4 kids. ★4.83 (41 reviews). Hosted by Louise (not Superhost). ⚠️ Despite the listing title and 'Apartment in Chamonix' label, location is actually in ARGENTIÈRE (~9 km NE of Chamonix center, near Grands Montets lifts) per coordinates [45.968, 6.916]. ~10 min drive to Hotel Lykke / Chamonix center; on the Mont Blanc Express train line. Only 1.5 baths for sleeps-8 capacity. Free cancellation before June 28, 2026. Availability + total confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 on 2026-05-11.

options.title: Hypercentre — 3BR with parking, sleeps 8
options.location: Chamonix Hypercentre — central Chamonix-Mont-Blanc with on-site parking
options.notes: Most expensive of the three but in the absolute center of Chamonix with on-site parking — biggest convenience win. Bedrooms: BR1 1 double + BR2 1 double + BR3 1 bunk; 5 beds total suggests an additional sofa bed in the living area. 2 doubles + bunk for kids = fits the family well. ★4.69 (107 reviews). Hosted by Lisa. Free cancellation before June 28, 2026. Availability + total confirmed for Jul 28-30, 2026 on 2026-05-11.

options.title: Center town beautiful apartment (2BR/2 doubles) — 4-person config
options.location: Central Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France (45.9227, 6.8692)
options.notes: Cheapest Chamonix 2BR option for the trimmer family-of-4 scenario (parents + 2 kids). Bedrooms: BR1 1 double + BR2 1 double — kids share the 2nd double. ★4.68. Hosted by Clémentine (not Superhost). Central Chamonix walking distance to everything. Free cancellation before July 23, 2026. Confirmed available for Jul 28-30, 2026 on 2026-05-11.

options.title: L'Annexe du By — Mont Blanc view + parking (2BR/double+bunk) — 4-person
options.location: Chamonix Sud, Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France (45.9158, 6.8660) — south side with Mont Blanc views
options.notes: Strong 4-person fit: BR1 1 double for parents + BR2 1 bunk bed for the 2 kids — gives kids their own room. ★4.89. Hosted by Perrine Et Baptiste. Includes parking (handy with a rental car) + Mont Blanc view. Free cancellation before June 28, 2026. South side of Chamonix (Chamonix Sud) — ~10 min walk to Hotel Lykke / town center. Confirmed available for Jul 28-30, 2026 on 2026-05-11.

options.title: New apartment — large terrace overlooking Mont Blanc (2BR/4 beds)
options.location: Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France — Mont Blanc terrace view
options.notes: Guest favorite per Airbnb search listing. 2BR/4 beds for 4 guests — bed config not individually verified but appears to match the parents-and-2-kids scenario. Larger and more expensive than the cheaper 2 options above. Availability + price ($855 for 2 nights) confirmed from search results on 2026-05-11.

name: Albert 1er — Michelin dinner, Chamonix
notes: 1-Michelin-star restaurant at Hôtel Mont-Blanc, Chamonix center. Run by the Carrier family for generations — one of the top dining experiences in the Alps. Refined Savoyard cuisine. Also under same ownership: La Maison Carrier (same building, more rustic/casual Savoyard setting — good backup or lunch option). Jul 28 is arrival night; Jul 29 is the Martigny concert day so evening may be busy. Book well in advance — peak July dates fill fast.

name: Hotel near Nice — 2 nights (Aug 3-5; visitor trip ends Aug 5)
notes: Visitor trip end was shifted from Aug 6 → Aug 5 (decided 2026-05-24). Group performers stay until Aug 6 per the performer schedule. Existing options below are mostly priced for the original 3-night Aug 3-6 window — recheck prices for the new 2-night Aug 3-5 window. New 2-night-specific options (CosyMoon, Charming 3BR Rossetti) added at bottom.

options.title: Elegant flat with AC, heart of Nice
options.location: Old Nice (Vieux Nice), France — 5-min walk to Cours Saleya and the beach; near Place Masséna
options.notes: ★4.99 (141 reviews), Top 5% of homes. Hosted by Bertrand (Superhost). Sleeping: queen in BR1, mezzanine with 2 singles (joinable to king) in BR2 — mezzanine ceiling 1.20 m (sleeping height only); plus sofa bed. Heads-up: Old Town can be noisy at night (host provides earplugs). Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $2,396 (from $2,442).

options.title: Nice 1 — Ocean-view, west Nice
options.location: 7 Av. Louis Cochois, 06000 Nice — west side; 10-min walk to Promenade des Anglais and beaches
options.notes: Sleeps 4 (2 double beds, BR1 has balcony access). 20-min walk to Vieux Nice, 10-min walk to tramway → 20 min to airport. No pets, no smoking. Was unavailable for the 3-night Aug 3-6 window (2026-05-10); ✅ NOW AVAILABLE for the new 2-night Aug 3-5 window at $989.44 (re-checked 2026-05-24).

options.title: Nice 6 — Beaulieu-sur-Mer (NOT in Nice)
options.location: 2 Imp. du Baous, 06310 Beaulieu-sur-Mer — coastal town ~20 min drive east of Nice city, not in Nice itself
options.notes: ⚠️ Located in BEAULIEU-SUR-MER, ~20-min drive from Nice city — different town despite the URL path. Near Beaulieu harbor, beaches, train terminal. 35 min to Nice airport. No pets, no smoking. UNAVAILABLE for Aug 3-6, 2026 (site message: 'The property you've chosen is not available at that time' as of 2026-05-10).

options.title: Possibly the best address in Nice! — 2BR, sleeps 5
options.location: Central Nice — 1-min walk to Promenade des Anglais, near Blue Beach, Albert 1st Gardens, and Verdure Theatre
options.notes: 75 m², 2BR, sleeps 5 — would have been the only confirmed flex-5 rental in the under-$1,500 tier. UNAVAILABLE for Aug 3-6, 2026 (verified manually by user on 2026-05-10 — calendar shows window blocked).

options.title: Sunlight Properties — Ruby (sea-view 2BR on Promenade)
options.location: Promenade des Anglais, Nice — direct sea-view building
amenities: King bed (singles can join into king)
options.notes: 2BR, 1 king + 2 singles (joinable into king), sleeps 4 — no flex for 5th adult. Peak rate ~€309/night → estimated ~$1,050 total for 3 nights. ⚠️ Sunlight Properties may have a 7+ night minimum during peak season; need to confirm 3-night booking accepted. Direct inquiry required — site doesn't show real-time calendars publicly.

options.title: Hyatt Regency Nice Palais de la Méditerranée — Family Suite (true 2BR)
options.location: 13 Promenade des Anglais, 06000 Nice — directly on the Promenade, Art Deco landmark
options.notes: 5-star Hyatt on the Promenade. Family Suite is a King Room + connected Twin Room — two separate bedrooms with a door between, two bathrooms — meets the privacy filter cleanly. Custom 2BR/3BR junior-suite configurations also available on request for the flex 5th adult. Estimated total: $1,500–$2,500 for 3 nights in peak August (rooms start ~$247/night; Family Suite premium adds 50–100%). ⚠️ Verify live price on hyatt.com — Hyatt isn't a Chase UR transfer partner, but World of Hyatt earn rate on the stay is solid. Cash booking earns 3x UR on Sapphire Reserve.

options.title: Opus 3 bedroom apartment (Vrbo) — central, near Place Masséna
options.location: Central Nice — 1 block from Place Masséna, 5 min walk to Avenue Jean Médecin, 8 min walk to Promenade des Anglais, 6 min walk to Place Masséna
options.notes: Vrbo 3BR/2BA, sleeps 6. Confirmed bedrooms: BR1 1 Double + BR2 1 Double — third bedroom config not shown in scrape but listing confirms 3 bedrooms sleeps 6 (likely 2 singles or sofa bed in BR3). 2 doubles meets the user's bed criteria. ★9.6 (7 reviews) — small review count. Located in central Nice between Place Masséna and Avenue Jean Médecin — excellent walking access to old town, beach, and shopping. Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $1,973 (from $2,004). Free cancellation until June 4, 2026.

options.title: Dum House & Spa — Old Town (★10, Premier Host)
options.location: Old Town (Vieux Nice), Nice — 3 min walk to beach, above the main old-town street, near the flower market
options.notes: ★10/10 (21 reviews), Premier Host — highest-rated Nice rental I found across Airbnb/Vrbo/TopVillas for these dates. Bedrooms: BR1 1 Queen + BR2 1 Queen — 2 baths (shower-only + shower+toilet). ⚠ Sleeps 6 is claimed but only 4 dedicated beds shown — the additional 2 sleepers would be on sofa beds in the living area (not a private kid bedroom). 4th floor in historic building, NO ELEVATOR — possible accessibility consideration. Partial sea view + Steam room spa included. Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $2,545 (from $2,585). Free cancellation until July 20.

options.title: 3-Brd Apt in trendy neighborhood (2 queens + 2 singles)
options.location: Nice, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France — trendy neighborhood, walking distance to main attractions (~43.6999, 7.28153, east of Vieux Nice)
options.notes: Best match for the family bed criteria. Bedrooms: BR1 1 queen + BR2 1 queen + BR3 2 single beds — 2 queens for adults, kid bedroom with 2 singles. ★4.86 (282 reviews). Hosted by Morgan (Superhost). 2 bathrooms. 'Trendiest neighborhood' per listing — coordinates [43.6999, 7.28153] place it east of Vieux Nice, walking distance to main attractions. Free cancellation before July 4, 2026. Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $1,910 (from $1,936).

options.title: Super Central Duplex — Jean Médecin, sleeps 8
options.location: Jean Médecin, central Nice (43.7003, 7.2685) — walking distance to Promenade des Anglais, Vieux Nice, Cours Saleya, Place Garibaldi, Port de Nice
amenities: Walking distance to all main attractions
options.notes: Spacious duplex near Avenue Jean Médecin (main shopping artery). Bedrooms: BR1 1 double + crib + BR2 1 double + 1 single + BR3 1 double + 1 single = 3 doubles + 2 singles (sleeps up to 8). Excellent for family of 6 with bed flexibility. ★4.8 (107 reviews). Hosted by Sandrine (Superhost). <10 min walk to Vieux Nice, Cours Saleya, Promenade des Anglais. ⚠️ UNAVAILABLE as of 2026-05-23 (was available 2026-05-11 at $2,015 — booked in the interim).

options.title: Luxurious 3BR — Port district (3 queens, ★5.0)
options.location: Port district, Nice (43.70652, 7.28857) — east of Vieux Nice, near Port de Nice and a park
options.notes: Most expensive of the new Airbnb adds but best rated. Bedrooms: BR1 1 queen + BR2 1 queen + BR3 1 queen — 3 queens (4 beds total per overview suggests 1 sofa bed). 2.5 baths for sleeps-8 capacity is generous. ★5.0 (Top Guest Favorite). Hosted by Charles (not Superhost). Port district is east of Vieux Nice — slightly less central than Carré d'Or, but residential vibe with a park nearby and walking distance to the harbor. ⚠️ UNAVAILABLE as of 2026-05-23 (was available 2026-05-11 at $2,124 — booked in the interim).

options.title: Magical view of Nice — Sunny balcony, Central (2BR/2 doubles) — 4-person
options.location: Central Nice (43.7012, 7.2775) — sunny balcony with city view
options.notes: Cheapest Nice 2BR for the family-of-4 scenario by ~$800 vs the 3BR options. Bedrooms: BR1 1 double + BR2 1 double — parents in one, kids share the other. ★4.77. Hosted by Adrien (not Superhost). 1.5 baths (one full + one half). ⚠️ LISTING REMOVED — URL returns 404 as of 2026-05-23 (was available 2026-05-11 at $1,152). May have been delisted entirely or moved.

options.title: Classic Chic Elegance — Close to Everything (2BR/3 beds, ★4.9)
options.location: Thiers neighborhood, Nice — central, close to everything
options.notes: ★4.9 with free cancellation. 2BR/3 beds for 4 guests — bed config not individually verified but should fit the family-of-4 scenario (1 double + likely 2 singles or another small bed). Located in Thiers (central Nice). Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $1,259 (from $1,276).

options.title: Nice Seaview Loft Promenade (★5.0 Superhost) — 2BR/3 beds
options.location: Baumettes neighborhood, Nice — Promenade-adjacent with sea view
options.notes: ★5.0 from a Superhost — highest-rated Nice 4-person 2BR I found. 2BR/3 beds for 4 guests. Located in Baumettes (west-central Nice), near the Promenade des Anglais with sea views. Bed config not individually verified — search snippet shows '3 beds' but specific layout TBD. Re-checked 2026-05-23: still available, total dropped to $1,394 (from $1,413).

options.title: CosyMoon Nice — Le Port (2-night Aug 3-5)
options.location: Le Port district, Nice — east of Vieux Nice, near the harbor
options.notes: ⚠️ Priced for 2 NIGHTS (Aug 3-5) — assumes trip terminates Aug 5 (under consideration as of 2026-05-24). NOT available for the original Aug 3-6 3-night window. 2BR/4 beds/1 bath, sleeps 6. ★4.81 (36 reviews), Superhost (Martin). Le Port district — east of Vieux Nice, same neighborhood as the (now-unavailable) Luxurious Port 3BR. Cheapest Nice option in the 6-guest tier. Trade-off: only 1 bathroom for 6 guests, less central than Carré d'Or / Vieux Nice.

options.title: Charming 3BR steps from Place Rossetti — Vieux Nice (2-night Aug 3-5)
options.location: Vieux Nice (Old Town) — steps from Place Rossetti, walkable to dining and main attractions
amenities: Family-friendly (100% of family stays rated 5 stars)
options.notes: ⚠️ Priced for 2 NIGHTS (Aug 3-5) — assumes trip terminates Aug 5 (under consideration as of 2026-05-24). 3BR/6 beds/2 baths, sleeps 6. ★4.8 (5 reviews — small sample, but 100% of family stays rated 5 stars). Hosted by Valery (2 years, not Superhost). Located in Vieux Nice (Old Town), steps from Place Rossetti — vibrant, walkable, lots of dining nearby. Self check-in via lockbox. Best 3BR location of all the Nice options if Old Town is the priority.

name: Flight EWR → GVA (outbound) — Option A ★
notes: ★ PREFERRED — Option A: All-EWR via United (best UR redemption play). 2 adults + 1 adult-fare teen (12+) + 1 child (2–11). Overnight transatlantic, sleep on plane, land Geneva morning, drive 1 hour to Chamonix (vs. 5 hours from Milan). Chase Sapphire Reserve: UR transfers 1:1 to United MileagePlus — Premium Plus saver typically 70–90k miles/seat one-way. Pay cash to earn 3x UR (8x via Chase Travel portal); apply $300 annual travel credit. Trip cancellation insurance applies. ⚠️ Departure-day note: drop Thandi at BCCC (Newtown, PA) by noon Mon Jul 27 for the YOBC group bus to JFK; then drive ~1h to EWR for your own 17:20 departure — tight but doable, leave by 2 PM at the latest.

options.title: United UA956 — EWR → GVA, Premium Plus (preferred)
options.notes: Nonstop overnight. Depart EWR 17:20 (Terminal C, gate ~130) → arrive GVA 07:30+1 (Terminal 1). Boeing 767-300, ~8h 10m. Premium Plus cabin = United's premium economy (2-3-2 layout, family of 4 fits cleanly across row + side pair). Estimated $2,800–$3,800 total for 4 seats in peak summer; midpoint ~$3,300. Award alternative: 70–90k UR transferred to MileagePlus per seat one-way when saver space opens — check united.com 'use miles' view.

name: Flight NCE → EWR (return, 1 stop CDG) — Option A ★
notes: ★ PREFERRED — Option A return: Nice (NCE) → Paris (CDG) on Air France, connect to United Premium Plus CDG → Newark (EWR). Matches the EWR-out outbound airport so parking/commute is symmetric from Hopewell. Two-ticket vs single-ticket trade-off below; single-ticket is safer (protected connection) but Air France is SkyTeam not Star Alliance so single-ticket pricing may be higher. Chase Sapphire Reserve trip-delay protection covers the connection if separate tickets. Pickup Thandi at BCCC (Newtown, PA) in evening after YOBC bus returns from JFK.

options.title: NCE → CDG → EWR — single multi-city ticket (recommended)
options.notes: Single ticket via united.com multi-city or Chase Travel portal — protected connection if AF delay causes missed CDG→EWR. Leg 1: Air France NCE → CDG ~6:00 AM → 7:35 AM, A320, 1h 35m. Leg 2: United Premium Plus CDG → EWR daytime ~11:30 AM → 14:00, 767-300, 8h 30m. Estimated total ~$3,200–$3,800 for 4 seats; midpoint ~$3,400. Earns 3x UR per dollar; 8x via Chase Travel portal. Book through chase.com/travel for 1.5x point redemption and 5x earn.

options.title: NCE → CDG (AF) + CDG → EWR (UA) — two separate tickets
options.notes: Two separate tickets: AF NCE→CDG ~$100–$150/pp × 4 = $400–$600. UA Premium Plus CDG→EWR ~$700–$1,000/pp × 4 = $2,800–$4,000. Total ~$3,200–$4,600; usually ~$200–$400 cheaper than single ticket. ⚠️ Risk: no protected connection — if AF flight is late, UA isn't obligated to rebook. Sapphire Reserve trip-delay insurance helps but doesn't eliminate the hassle. Allow 3+ hour CDG layover if booking separately.

name: Le Mas Sivan, Arles — 4 nights (BOOKED)
notes: Booked on Airbnb 2026-05-10. Le Mas Sivan — terrace, secured parking, AC. Host: Djema (+33 6 70 55 83 64). 9 Rue du Pont de Langlois, 13200 Arles. Check-in after 5 PM Jul 30; checkout by 10 AM Aug 3. 4 adults + 2 children (6-guest max). ⚠️ No CO detector reported — bring portable. Smoke alarm present. Stairs required. Payment $1,493.25 to Visa 5940, scheduled for Jul 21, 2026. Free cancellation until 5 PM Jul 29 (Arles local time); partial refund after.

options.title: Le Mas Sivan — terrasse, parking sécurisé, clim (CHOSEN)
options.location: 9 Rue du Pont de Langlois, 13200 Arles, France (south Arles, near the Pont de Langlois — the Van Gogh bridge)
options.notes: Hosted by Djema. Confirmation HM9S8PCSBF. ⚠️ No CO detector — bring portable. Stairs required. 6-guest max, no pets, no parties. Free cancellation until 5 PM Jul 29 Arles local time.

options.title: Villa Barbara
options.location: Arles, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France — 5-min walk from train station; 1 min from the Arles arenas and historic center
options.notes: 95 m² house over 2 floors. Bedrooms: queen + double + queen, plus a single-bed area. Hosted by Claire (only 3 months hosting — new host). ★3.5 from just 2 reviews — limited data. ⚠️ One reviewer flagged bedding quality and general upkeep. ⚠️ Listing notes 'Carbon monoxide alarm: Unavailable' — no CO alarm in the unit. Note: the URL the option was added with embeds dates Jul 31-Aug 7; price above is for the actual reservation window Jul 30-Aug 3. Availability confirmed for Jul 30-Aug 3, 2026 (total $1,006) on 2026-05-10.

options.title: Large apartment Arelate Sejour (3 nights only)
options.location: Arles, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France
options.notes: Entire 4BR / 2.5BA rental, sleeps 7. Bedrooms: BR1 king + BR2 king + BR3 king + BR4 single. ★4.72 (164 reviews). Hosted by Damien. ⚠ Does NOT cover the full Arles reservation window: available only Jul 31-Aug 3 (3 nights, $1,651), NOT Jul 30. The Jul 30 → 31 night blocks booking the whole 4-night stay here in a single reservation. To use this property, you'd need a separate Jul 30→31 booking elsewhere. 3-night availability + price confirmed on 2026-05-11.

options.title: The Arlesian of the Arenas — Arles Center + Terrace
options.location: Arles Center, near the Roman Arena (Amphithéâtre), Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France
options.notes: Entire townhouse in Arles center, walking distance to the Roman Arena. Bedrooms: BR1 queen + BR2 double + BR3 2 singles (sleeps 6). ★4.87 out of 5. Hosted by Philippe & Liz (Superhost). Private backyard + terrace. Free cancellation before June 30. ⚠️ Listing notes 'Carbon monoxide alarm: Unavailable' — no CO alarm in the unit. Note: URL the user shared embedded dates Jul 31-Aug 3; price above is for the full reservation window Jul 30-Aug 3 (4 nights). Availability confirmed for Jul 30-Aug 3, 2026 (total $1,303) on 2026-05-10.

options.title: Le Régence (hotel — 2 rooms)
options.location: 5 Rue Marius Jouveau, 13200 Arles — riverside, walking distance to the Roman arena (~5 min)
options.notes: 3-star hotel by the Rhône, ~5-min walk to the group's Ibis Styles and the historic center. ★8.6 (430 reviews) on Booking. Quoted total is 2 × Comfort Double (max 2 adults each) — fits 4 adults + 2 kids if kids share rooms; some rooms tight at 172 sqft. Excludes €1.5/person/night city tax + 10% VAT (~$130 extra). Free cancellation before July 16, 2026 (non-refundable rate is $922). Hotel walking distance from group; not a family-suite-style hotel so room configs are smaller than the Airbnbs.

options.title: Hôtel le Mas des Ponts d'Arles (hotel — 2 family rooms)
options.location: 10 Avenue des Prés d'Arlac, 30300 Fourques (across the Rhône from Arles, ~10 min drive to Ibis Styles group hotel)
options.notes: ★8.4 (625 reviews). 2 × Family Room (each sleeps 4: full + 2 bunks, OR 2 twins + 1 bunk). Total $1,440 refundable / $1,400 non-refundable. ⚠ Address is in FOURQUES (30300), across the Rhône from Arles proper — postal code is Gard département, not Bouches-du-Rhône. ~10 min drive to the group's Ibis Styles + historic center; not walkable. Best for road-trippers who'd rather drive in and out. Excludes €0.83/person/night city tax + 10% VAT (~$140 extra).

options.title: Hotel Spa Le Calendal (hotel — Family + Double)
options.location: 5 Rue Porte de Laure, 13200 Arles — steps from the Roman arena and theatre, in the historic center
options.notes: 3-star boutique with spa, literally next to the Roman arena (~3 min walk to Ibis Styles group hotel). ★9.0 (790 reviews) — best-reviewed hotel of the four. Quoted total: 1 Family Room ($1,127, sleeps 4: 2 twins + queen) + 1 Triple Room ($748, sleeps 3: twin + queen) = $1,875 — fits all 6. Excludes €2.45/person/night city tax + 10% VAT (~$250 extra). Free cancellation through 6 PM on July 30. Note: spa access listed as adults-only.

options.title: Hôtel Amphithéâtre (hotel — 2 Deluxe Triples)
options.location: 5-7 Rue Diderot, 13200 Arles — next to the Roman arena, in the historic center
options.notes: Boutique 3-star hotel right next to the Roman arena (~3 min walk to Ibis Styles group hotel). ★8.6 (1,618 reviews) — by far the most reviewed of the four. Quoted total: 2 × Deluxe Triple Room (each sleeps 3, 377 sqft, beds reconfigurable to 1 twin + 1 queen OR 3 twins). Excludes €2.45/person/night city tax + 10% VAT (~$260 extra). Free cancellation through July 25, 2026. Most expensive of the hotel set, but biggest rooms and best location for sightseeing.

options.title: Le Mas Sivan — terrace, secure parking, A/C
options.location: Arles, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France
options.notes: Entire townhouse in Arles with private patio + backyard. Bedrooms: BR1 queen + BR2 2 singles + BR3 queen (sleeps 6). ★4.97 out of 5 (35 reviews) — exceptional rating. Hosted by Djema.
